Work

Selected Projects

Research-grade ML meets pragmatic engineering from autonomous driving perception to knowledge graphs and NLP.

Research Paper Computer Vision

Multi-Modal Edge Detection for Autonomous Driving

Fused RGB + LiDAR depth maps using a dual-encoder ResNet-18 with channel-attention fusion. Achieved Boundary F-score 0.9874 and AP 0.3557 on KITTI outperforming the camera-only baseline.

PythonPyTorchResNet-18LiDARKITTI
View on GitHub
Patent Holder AR/VR · Full-Stack

METASTORE 3D Virtual Try-On

Patent-backed AI garment fitting system (Patent No. 202321018653). Converts 2D product photos into interactive 3D avatars via DeepLabV3 segmentation. Full-stack MERN web app that reduced return rates by targeting the fit uncertainty gap.

DeepLabV3Three.jsReactNode.jsMongoDB
View on GitHub
Knowledge Graphs Graph Neural Networks

Fintech Fraud Detection via Knowledge Graphs & GNNs

Aligned Wikidata and DBpedia using PyKEEN (TransE, RotatE, DistMult) MRR 0.197, Hits@10 0.295. Built a GraphSAGE GNN in PyTorch Geometric for fraud detection achieving AUC-ROC 0.8249, decisively outperforming embedding-only models.

PyKEENPyTorch GeometricSPARQLWikidataGraphSAGE
View on GitHub
Deep Learning Generative

Variational Autoencoder Fashion-MNIST

Convolutional VAE from scratch in PyTorch strided encoder-decoder, BatchNorm, reparameterization, ELBO loss. Ablations over latent size (2D–64D) and KL weight λ. Achieved reconstruction MSE 0.0145 vs. 0.1850 baseline, with 15/15 sanity checks passing.

PythonPyTorchVAECNNGenerative AI

Story

About

I grew up in Mumbai, taking things apart long before I knew how to put them back together. That curiosity gradually shifted from circuits to code and eventually to data: how people behave, how systems scale, and why some ideas compound while others stall.

My background blends electronics and computer science engineering with business analytics and product-thinking roles. At GRG India, I learned how much impact you can create by simply making complex data legible building Python pipelines over tens of millions of records and SQL models that plugged directly into growth decisions.

Today, as an MSc student at the University of Galway and a Graduate Teaching Assistant, I move between research and delivery. Long-term, I want to keep building systems at the intersection of ML, experimentation, and sustainable growth where models, metrics, and humans all stay in the loop.
